description: Debt contract for a sum of 300 dirhams. One of the parties is Hiba. Written and signed by Moshe b. Aharon ha-Kohen. There is an addendum or perhaps simply a witness clause written and signed by Yeḥiʾel b. Yehuda stating that ʿEli ha-Kohen (b.?) Sulaymān b. Yeshuʿa testified that Abū l-Faraj Ibn al-Rabbāṣ will pay Yūsuf b. Bū l-Faraj. On verso there are piyyutim.
